retry_reason: refcount_inc is unconditional and always succeeds; no failure path exists.
contract_summary: This is a get-wrapper that unconditionally increments the reference count of a struct btf object. The caller must already hold a valid pointer to the BTF object; after calling btf_get, the caller acquires an additional reference and is responsible for releasing it via a corresponding btf_put call when the reference is no longer needed. The function does not return any status and cannot fail.

judge.reason: The function consists solely of a refcount_inc call on btf->refcnt; its sole purpose is to acquire a reference on the BTF object.
